## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Airbyte and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, recent performance, and next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/36iJP7HWw1-x98zB1CMkMatd-nJeyCkk?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Recent content refreshes (4 batches) show mixed results; traffic down 14-27% but impressions mostly flat](https://fathom.video/share/36iJP7HWw1-x98zB1CMkMatd-nJeyCkk?tab=summary&timestamp=464.0)
  - [New editorial focus: content around data sovereignty, compliance, and hybrid deployments for regulated industries](https://fathom.video/share/36iJP7HWw1-x98zB1CMkMatd-nJeyCkk?tab=summary&timestamp=1389.0)
  - [PSEO initiatives planned but timing dependent on new website launch in \~2 months](https://fathom.video/share/36iJP7HWw1-x98zB1CMkMatd-nJeyCkk?tab=summary&timestamp=1834.0)
  - [Team changes: Carrie (new managing editor) and Darrell (managing director) joining; Jacob staying for strategy](https://fathom.video/share/36iJP7HWw1-x98zB1CMkMatd-nJeyCkk?tab=summary&timestamp=70.0)

## Topics

### Content Refresh Performance

  - [4 batches of refreshes live, 3 have data (1 too new)](https://fathom.video/share/36iJP7HWw1-x98zB1CMkMatd-nJeyCkk?tab=summary&timestamp=454.0)
  - [Traffic down 14-27% across batches, but 2 improved since Monday](https://fathom.video/share/36iJP7HWw1-x98zB1CMkMatd-nJeyCkk?tab=summary&timestamp=468.0)
  - [Impressions mostly flat or slightly growing](https://fathom.video/share/36iJP7HWw1-x98zB1CMkMatd-nJeyCkk?tab=summary&timestamp=505.0)
  - [Complicating factors: 6-month downward trend, Google algorithm changes](https://fathom.video/share/36iJP7HWw1-x98zB1CMkMatd-nJeyCkk?tab=summary&timestamp=484.0)
  - [Plan: Monitor for 2-4 more weeks before drawing conclusions](https://fathom.video/share/36iJP7HWw1-x98zB1CMkMatd-nJeyCkk?tab=summary&timestamp=564.0)
  - [Technical SEO check needed to rule out indexing issues](https://fathom.video/share/36iJP7HWw1-x98zB1CMkMatd-nJeyCkk?tab=summary&timestamp=661.0)

### New Editorial Content Strategy

  - [Focus on data sovereignty and compliance for regulated industries](https://fathom.video/share/36iJP7HWw1-x98zB1CMkMatd-nJeyCkk?tab=summary&timestamp=1037.0)
  - [Tied to Airbyte's new hybrid deployment offering](https://fathom.video/share/36iJP7HWw1-x98zB1CMkMatd-nJeyCkk?tab=summary&timestamp=1293.0)
  - [Topics: audit preparation, data residency, AI-ready data](https://fathom.video/share/36iJP7HWw1-x98zB1CMkMatd-nJeyCkk?tab=summary&timestamp=1181.0)
  - [Opportunity to create scalable content across verticals/company types](https://fathom.video/share/36iJP7HWw1-x98zB1CMkMatd-nJeyCkk?tab=summary&timestamp=1467.0)
  - [Next steps: Mario/Tanmay to provide brief, GrowthX to do keyword research](https://fathom.video/share/36iJP7HWw1-x98zB1CMkMatd-nJeyCkk?tab=summary&timestamp=1579.0)

### PSEO Initiatives

  - [5 potential focus areas identified (e.g. connect pages, industry pages)](https://fathom.video/share/36iJP7HWw1-x98zB1CMkMatd-nJeyCkk?tab=summary&timestamp=1719.0)
  - [Work can begin on structure/strategy before new site launch](https://fathom.video/share/36iJP7HWw1-x98zB1CMkMatd-nJeyCkk?tab=summary&timestamp=1824.0)
  - [Goal: Have 75% progress on at least one page type before launch](https://fathom.video/share/36iJP7HWw1-x98zB1CMkMatd-nJeyCkk?tab=summary&timestamp=1841.0)
  - [Tanmay to prioritize list and send to GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/36iJP7HWw1-x98zB1CMkMatd-nJeyCkk?tab=summary&timestamp=2003.0)

### Team/Operational Updates

  - [Carrie joining as dedicated managing editor](https://fathom.video/share/36iJP7HWw1-x98zB1CMkMatd-nJeyCkk?tab=summary&timestamp=127.0)
  - [Darrell introduced as managing director](https://fathom.video/share/36iJP7HWw1-x98zB1CMkMatd-nJeyCkk?tab=summary&timestamp=276.0)
  - [Jacob staying involved for strategy, Carrie point of contact for quality/operations](https://fathom.video/share/36iJP7HWw1-x98zB1CMkMatd-nJeyCkk?tab=summary&timestamp=399.0)
  - [David exiting, strategy sprint phase concluding](https://fathom.video/share/36iJP7HWw1-x98zB1CMkMatd-nJeyCkk?tab=summary&timestamp=426.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Tanmay/Mario to sync and provide:](https://fathom.video/share/36iJP7HWw1-x98zB1CMkMatd-nJeyCkk?tab=summary&timestamp=1764.0)
    1.  Brief on new editorial content focus
    2.  Prioritized list of PSEO page types
  - [GrowthX to:](https://fathom.video/share/36iJP7HWw1-x98zB1CMkMatd-nJeyCkk?tab=summary&timestamp=1543.0)
    1.  Begin keyword research for new editorial content
    2.  Start structuring first PSEO page type (once prioritized)
    3.  Consult with Dave on technical SEO analysis of refreshes
  - [Carrie to sync with engineering on fixing table bugs in existing content](https://fathom.video/share/36iJP7HWw1-x98zB1CMkMatd-nJeyCkk?tab=summary&timestamp=710.0)
  - [Continue monitoring performance of initial content refresh batches](https://fathom.video/share/36iJP7HWw1-x98zB1CMkMatd-nJeyCkk?tab=summary&timestamp=464.0)
